user_prompt: search the web to find the current date

tasks.input_text: search the web to find the current date

tasks.description: Select tool name for the intent
Execute web search using the selected tool
tasks.system_prompt_template:
You are a wrapper for the search tool. Return ONLY the raw text result from the search.

EXAMPLES:
Input query: "current date"
Result: "2026-04-08"

Input query: "today's date"
Result: "2026-04-08"

Input query: "date now"
Result: "2026-04-08"
---
Input query: {query_string}
Tool name: {tool_name}
Tool result: {t4_search_result}
Output:
tasks.output: ```json { "query": "current date", "engines": [ "duckduckgo" ], "totalResults": 10, "results": [ { "title": "timeanddate.com", "url": "https://www.timeanddate.com/", "description": "Set the current time of your favorite locations across time zones.", "source": "www.timeanddate.com", "engine": "duckduckgo" }, { "title": "Time.is - exact time, any time zone", "url": "https://time.is/", "description": "7 million locations, 58 languages, synchronized with atomic clock time.", "source": "time.is", "engine": "duckduckgo" }, { "title": "What's Today's Date and Time? — Free Online Clocks, Converters ...", "url": "https://todaysdateandtime.com/", "description": "Free online date and time tools — world clock, time zone converter, countdown timers, date calculators, and more. Browse cities, countries, and timezones with their current times.
